text.title: ai-interview-analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ai-interview-analysis as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Publishing AI analysis output directly to stakeholders without researcher review.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI analysis output is a draft, not a finding. Agents produce plausible-sounding themes that may not be grounded in the actual transcript. Researcher review is the only quality gate.

failure-mode.description: Accepting themes where the agent cannot provide a direct verbatim quote.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents generate unsupported themes confidently. The quote requirement forces the agent to ground outputs in evidence and makes hallucination visible.

failure-mode.description: Skipping speaker diarization review for sessions with 3+ participants.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Speaker identification degrades with similar vocal qualities. Misattributed quotes corrupt theme analysis downstream — a minority participant's view gets credited to the majority.

failure-mode.description: Applying sentiment analysis findings without contextualizing researcher tone or framing effects.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI sentiment scoring does not account for how researcher phrasing influenced participant responses. Negative sentiment on a leading question is not a product finding.

failure-mode.description: Uploading sensitive participant data (health, legal, financial disclosures) to SaaS transcription tools without verifying consent and data residency.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: GDPR/CCPA requires AI processing disclosure in participant consent forms. Most SaaS tools process on US servers — non-compliant for EU participants without appropriate lawful basis.

failure-mode.description: Chunking long transcripts by token count rather than discussion guide section.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Arbitrary token boundaries split mid-thought, causing the agent to lose context for theme attribution. Section-based chunking preserves semantic coherence.

failure-mode.description: Treating agent-inferred participant demographics as confirmed facts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents hallucinate persona characteristics from thin linguistic cues. Any demographic not explicitly stated by the participant must be flagged as inferred and validated separately.
